fair_value_today.basis: base case (Metis) intrinsic value — the anchor, not a weighted blend

fair_value_12m.basis: #1 rolled forward at r=9.0% less dividend 0.0

detail.multiple_rationale: Our fair value of $57.34 divided by NTM non-GAAP EPS of $3.07 = 18.7x. This IS the justified NTM P/E at our 10.5% WACC. It is NOT a separate 'defensible' multiple -- it is derived from the SOTP. The #4 target = #1 fair value rolled 12m forward (at WACC, no separate multiple compression), leaned by evidence quality. No positive lean applies: the bull case (CSS acceleration, AGI CPU supply unlock) is EXTRAPOLATED evidence, not CONTRACTED -- per METHODS, only CONTRACTED bull moves the target above intrinsic. The OBSERVABLE-AND-NEAR bear (Qualcomm appeal, China RISC-V, AI capex pause) argues against leaning bullish. Target = $57.41 (18.7x × $3.07 = fair value today re-expressed as P/E, no lean applied).

street_reconstruction.what_price_implies: At 143.2x NTM non-GAAP P/E ($439.46 / $3.07 EPS), the current price implies a ~43.1% earnings CAGR for 10y (then 5% terminal) at r=12.5%.
street_reconstruction.what_street_implies: The street mean target implies ~36.1% for 10y.
street_reconstruction.history_anchor: Non-GAAP EPS CAGR approximated from revenue/margin improvement since FY2024 IPO; revenue CAGR FY2023-FY2026 was 22.5% p.a.
street_reconstruction.contested_lever: Royalty rate per chip (blended): v9/CSS migration uplifts ARM's effective rate by 2x-4x; RISC-V displacement and Qualcomm legal precedent are the caps. Whether the blended rate doubles from FY2026 to FY2030 (base) or only rises 50% (bear) is the crux.

conviction.label: MEDIUM
conviction.basis: action SELL: Daedalus assigned MEDIUM (evidence read across base/bull/bear) -> MEDIUM

bridge_logic: #1 fair value today 57.36 -> #3 fair value 12m 62.52 (x(1+0.090) - div 0.0); #4 target 12m 57.41 (defensible_multiple); implied return to #4 = -86.9%, to #3 = -85.8%, to street mean 275.0 = -37.4%
